## Meeting Purpose

[Review weekly calendar and address urgent business matters, particularly regarding Ramp account and invoicing.](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramp invoice ($135k) is overdue by \~3 weeks; urgent follow-up needed due to contract expiration and scope changes](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Calendar adjustments made for the week, including rescheduling kickoffs and moving meetings](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Office lease negotiations ongoing; Charlie to push back on unreasonable redline requests](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Need to establish stronger relationships with key accounts, especially high-value ones like Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Review and Adjustments

  - [Moved Monday onboarding meeting for new hires to next week](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Rescheduling kickoffs for VAPI and GCI; Marcel to be optional attendee](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Discussed Karan's bi-weekly sync meetings with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Ramp Account Situation

  - [$135k invoice sent on Feb 14th, now \~3 weeks overdue](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Contract technically expired; no auto-renewal in place](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Scope included AI enablement (6 trainings) which is no longer offered](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Loss of key stakeholders (G leaving, Luke on paternity leave) complicates communication](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Potential scenarios:](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [Best case: Ramp pays, new contract negotiated with updated scope](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [Worst case: Ramp refuses to pay, citing no active contract](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)

### Office Lease Negotiations

  - [Charlie pushing back on new redline requests from landlord](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Unreasonable clause: 90-day notice period for pre-existing issues](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Expectation to finalize today, but ongoing additions causing delays](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

### Invoice and Account Management

  - [Discussed need for better tracking of high-value accounts](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Identified gaps in relationship management for key customers](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Erickson now handling invoice follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Potential Hiring Decision

  - [Brief mention of Sarah, who has another offer](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Marcel to discuss further with Bridget via WhatsApp](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to consider strategy for Ramp account, potentially escalating to Karim (CTO and investor)](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

  - [Team to improve tracking and relationship management for key accounts](https://fathom.video/share/fbLdA2zJ3dEy3H98g_VGFAmTsSwkbBXW?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
